overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a luxurious modern bedroom interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a rainy futuristic cityscape at dusk. The scene features contemporary furniture including a platform bed and designer chair, with atmospheric lighting suggesting a high-end game engine render.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse bedroom with panoramic city views

segments.scene_description: A static view of a luxurious modern bedroom interior with dark wood flooring and contemporary furnishings. Floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the far wall, offering a view of a rainy futuristic cityscape at dusk. The room contains a platform bed with white linens in the foreground, a modern armchair positioned near the windows, and a large circular rug, all rendered with high-quality game engine graphics.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic gaze into a luxurious modern bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a cozy interior and a rainy futuristic cityscape. It begins with a focus on the room's high-end details, highlighting the dark wood flooring and a platform bed with crisp white linens in the foreground. The perspective then draws the eye toward the center of the space, passing over a large circular rug and a designer armchair positioned for viewing. Finally, the scene opens up to the floor-to-ceiling windows that dominate the far wall, revealing a sprawling, rain-slicked metropolis under the dim light of dusk.
